\tzpentry{ID5469}{Digits Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5469 introduces Digits Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$_digits = Function[{spherical_coords}, Module[{rational_approximation, continued_fraction, digit_stream}, (* Rational approximation via continued fractions *) continued_fraction = ContinuedFraction[ N[{#θ, #φ} & /@ spherical_coords, precision], Length $
\]
